# Day018 site-energy trajectory

- Complete frames: 21
- Embedded TDDFT calculations represented: 84
- Physical scope: solvent-induced site-energy fluctuations under frozen-solute conditions.
- Hamiltonian scope: diagonal terms only; off-diagonal couplings are not yet included.
